---
title: "The Rev. Walter Francis Elgie"
---

## The Rev. Walter Francis Elgie

**Dates:** (12 Oct 1837-25 Feb 1881)

### Description

curate, then Vicar of Otterbourne

### Biography

He married (1869) Catharine, daughter of Colonel F. Hammond and widow of Captain Webber.  He was a scholar of Lancing 1853, MA St. Edmund Hall 1859, curate of Otterbourne 1870-6, vicar of Otterbourne 1876-81 [Lancing Register]

### Letters

- Letter from July 20th 1881
- Letter from July 2, 1881.
- Letter from March 12  [1881]
- Letter from 25th February [1881]
- Letter from Feb 24th [?1881[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Feb 13th 1881
- Letter from November 1876
- Letter from July 6th [1876?]
- Letter from March 20th 1876
- Letter from [1874?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from 14 May 1872
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from December 30 [1871]
- Letter from Oct 4th [1870s?] [[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
